title: Chinese Tofu Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry recipe made with tofu and noodles, inspired by Chinese cuisine.

ingredients.name: Tofu
ingredients.notes: Press and drain excess water before cutting into small cubes

ingredients.name: Dense Noodles
ingredients.notes: Rice noodles or udon work well for this recipe

instructions: 1. Cook noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
2. Cut tofu into small cubes and marinate in a mixture of soy sauce, sesame oil, and a pinch of sugar for at least 15 minutes.
3. Heat 1 tbsp of vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add minced garlic and grated ginger and stir fry for 30 seconds.
5. Add marinated tofu and stir fry until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
6. Add chopped scallions and stir fry for another minute.
7. Stir in cooked noodles and cook for 2-3 minutes, until well combined.
8. Season with additional soy sauce if needed.
9. Garnish with chopped scallions and serve hot.
